---
title: "William Waldegrave,, Viscount Chewton"
---

## William Waldegrave,, Viscount Chewton

**Dates:** (1816-1854)

### Description

army officer, eldest son of the 8th Earl Waldegrave and brother-in-law of the 1st Earl of Selborne

### Letters

- Letter from January 2, 1897

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
